mapper.select: SELECT id, parent_id, menu_name, path, component, perms, type, icon, sort, create_time, update_time, is_deleted FROM sys_menu WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND (perms LIKE CONCAT('%', #{roleCode}, '%') OR perms = '' OR perms IS NULL) ORDER BY sort ASC

SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM sys_user_role ur LEFT JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON ur.role_id = rm.role_id LEFT JOIN sys_menu m ON rm.menu_id = m.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY m.sort ASC
